description: Style Note Updated summer style for your feet with catwalk's latest line. Inspired by the fresh fashion fetishes this season, this pair of sandals exemplify versatility - they look good with everything from smart formal day wear to breezy spring separates. Style them with an all-pastel coloured ensembles or a colour pop one, they go well with both! Heel: 3" Product Description Thong style straps with bead details all over it (and a synthetic toe separator) Padded nubuck footbed Wedge heel with lined grooves on the sides TPU outsole with grooves on the forefoot and heel patch Material and Care Synthetic Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash or use a drier Do not store in direct sunlight
